desc.en: Words, characters, sentences, reading time, and keyword density as you type.
desc.de: Wörter, Zeichen, Sätze, Lesezeit und Keyword-Dichte während du tippst.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g stroke="#fff" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M26 32 H74"/><path d="M26 47 H74"/><path d="M26 62 H50"/><path d="M64 56 V68"/></g></svg>

desc.en: A private notepad that autosaves to your device, with live word and line counts.
desc.de: Ein privater Notizblock, der automatisch auf deinem Gerät speichert, mit Live-Wort- und Zeilenzählung.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><path d="M28 20 H58 L74 36 V80 H28 Z" fill="#fff"/><path d="M58 20 V36 H74" fill="none" stroke="{{ACCENT}}" stroke-width="4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><g stroke="{{ACCENT}}" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M37 50 H64"/><path d="M37 60 H64"/><path d="M37 70 H54"/></g></svg>

desc.en: Percent of a number, increase/decrease, discounts, and tips. Formula included.
desc.de: Prozent einer Zahl, Zunahme/Abnahme, Rabatte und Trinkgeld. Formel inklusive.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g fill="none" stroke="#fff"><circle cx="34" cy="34" r="8.5" stroke-width="7"/><circle cx="66" cy="66" r="8.5" stroke-width="7"/><path d="M67 29 L33 71" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/></g></svg>

desc.en: Body mass index in metric or imperial, with your WHO category and healthy range.
desc.de: Body-Mass-Index in metrischen oder imperialen Einheiten, mit deiner WHO-Kategorie und dem gesunden Bereich.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><rect x="28" y="26" width="44" height="48" rx="9" fill="#fff"/><path d="M38 46 a12 12 0 0 1 24 0" fill="none" stroke="{{ACCENT}}" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M50 46 L57 38" stroke="{{ACCENT}}" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

desc.en: Monthly payment, total interest, and a full amortization schedule for any loan.
desc.de: Monatliche Rate, Gesamtzinsen und ein vollständiger Tilgungsplan für jeden Kredit.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="6" stroke-linejoin="round"><ellipse cx="50" cy="32" rx="22" ry="8"/><path d="M28 32 v14 c0 4.4 9.85 8 22 8 s22 -3.6 22 -8 v-14"/><path d="M28 46 v14 c0 4.4 9.85 8 22 8 s22 -3.6 22 -8 v-14"/></g></svg>

desc.en: What your car will be worth, and what owning it really costs per year and distance driven.
desc.de: Was dein Auto wert sein wird und was der Besitz wirklich kostet, pro Jahr und gefahrener Strecke.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><path d="M22 56 L29 40 a5 5 0 0 1 5 -3 h22 a5 5 0 0 1 5 3 l7 16" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><rect x="20" y="55" width="50" height="13" rx="4" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="31" cy="72" r="5" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="59" cy="72" r="5" fill="#fff"/><path d="M80 30 V58" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M72 50 L80 60 L88 50" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>

desc.en: Convert length, weight, temperature, and 7 more categories, with the formula shown.
desc.de: Rechne Länge, Gewicht, Temperatur und 7 weitere Kategorien um, mit angezeigter Formel.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M28 38 H66"/><path d="M56 28 L70 38 L56 48"/><path d="M72 62 H34"/><path d="M44 52 L30 62 L44 72"/></g></svg>

desc.en: Strong random passwords, passphrases, and PINs with time-to-crack estimates.
desc.de: Starke Zufallspasswörter, Passphrasen und PINs mit Knackzeit-Schätzungen.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><path d="M38 48 V38 a12 12 0 0 1 24 0 V48" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="8"/><rect x="30" y="48" width="40" height="30" rx="6" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="50" cy="60" r="5" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><rect x="47.5" y="61" width="5" height="9" rx="2" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/></svg>

desc.en: QR codes for links, Wi-Fi, vCards, and more. No watermark, never expire.
desc.de: QR-Codes für Links, WLAN, vCards und mehr. Kein Wasserzeichen, laufen nie ab.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g fill="#fff"><rect x="22" y="22" width="24" height="24"/><rect x="54" y="22" width="24" height="24"/><rect x="22" y="54" width="24" height="24"/><rect x="54" y="54" width="10" height="10"/><rect x="68" y="54" width="10" height="10"/><rect x="54" y="68" width="10" height="10"/><rect x="68" y="68" width="10" height="10"/></g><g fill="{{ACCENT}}"><rect x="28" y="28" width="12" height="12"/><rect x="60" y="28" width="12" height="12"/><rect x="28" y="60" width="12" height="12"/></g></svg>

desc.en: Secure random numbers, dice, coin flips, and pick-from-a-list draws.
desc.de: Sichere Zufallszahlen, Würfel, Münzwürfe und Ziehungen aus einer Liste.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><rect x="26" y="26" width="48" height="48" rx="11" fill="#fff"/><g fill="{{ACCENT}}"><circle cx="40" cy="40" r="5"/><circle cx="60" cy="40" r="5"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="5"/><circle cx="40" cy="60" r="5"/><circle cx="60" cy="60" r="5"/></g></svg>

desc.en: Code 128 and EAN-13 barcodes with check digits, as PNG or print-ready SVG.
desc.de: Code-128- und EAN-13-Barcodes mit Prüfziffern, als PNG oder druckfertiges SVG.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g fill="#fff"><rect x="24" y="28" width="5" height="44"/><rect x="33" y="28" width="3" height="44"/><rect x="40" y="28" width="7" height="44"/><rect x="51" y="28" width="3" height="44"/><rect x="58" y="28" width="5" height="44"/><rect x="67" y="28" width="3" height="44"/><rect x="74" y="28" width="5" height="44"/></g></svg>

desc.en: Format, minify, and validate JSON with exact error locations and a tree view.
desc.de: Formatiere, minifiziere und prüfe JSON mit genauen Fehlerpositionen und einer Baumansicht.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M42 24 c-10 0 -10 8 -10 14 v6 c0 8 -8 8 -8 8 c0 0 8 0 8 8 v6 c0 6 0 14 10 14"/><path d="M58 24 c10 0 10 8 10 14 v6 c0 8 8 8 8 8 c0 0 -8 0 -8 8 v6 c0 6 0 14 -10 14"/></g></svg>

desc.en: MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256/512 for text or files, hashed locally and never uploaded.
desc.de: MD5, SHA-1 und SHA-256/512 für Text oder Dateien, lokal gehasht und nie hochgeladen.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g stroke="#fff" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M42 26 L34 74"/><path d="M68 26 L60 74"/><path d="M26 44 H74"/><path d="M24 58 H72"/></g></svg>

desc.en: Convert epoch timestamps to dates and back, in UTC and your local time zone.
desc.de: Wandle Epochen-Timestamps in Daten um und zurück, in UTC und deiner lokalen Zeitzone.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="26" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="7"/><path d="M50 50 V33" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M50 50 L64 58" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

desc.en: Test regular expressions live with match highlighting, groups, and replace.
desc.de: Teste reguläre Ausdrücke live mit Treffer-Hervorhebung, Gruppen und Ersetzen.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M50 26 V50"/><path d="M50 50 L72 37"/><path d="M50 50 L72 63"/><path d="M50 50 L28 63"/><path d="M50 50 L28 37"/></g><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="7" fill="#fff"/></svg>

desc.en: Encode and decode Base64 with correct UTF-8, URL-safe output, and files.
desc.de: Kodiere und dekodiere Base64 mit korrektem UTF-8, URL-sicherer Ausgabe und Dateien.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M38 30 L24 50 L38 70"/><path d="M62 30 L76 50 L62 70"/></g><rect x="46" y="44" width="8" height="8" rx="2" fill="#fff"/><rect x="46" y="58" width="8" height="8" rx="2" fill="#fff"/></svg>

desc.en: Compress, resize, and convert JPEG, PNG, and WebP to an exact target size.
desc.de: Komprimiere, skaliere und konvertiere JPEG, PNG und WebP auf eine genaue Zielgröße.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><rect x="24" y="30" width="52" height="40" rx="6" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="6"/><circle cx="62" cy="41" r="4.5" fill="#fff"/><path d="M29 67 L42 51 L52 61 L60 53 L71 67 Z" fill="#fff"/></svg>

desc.en: Convert HEX, RGB, HSL, and OKLCH, with tints, shades, and color harmonies.
desc.de: Rechne HEX, RGB, HSL und OKLCH um, mit Aufhellungen, Abdunklungen und Farbharmonien.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><path d="M50 22 C50 22 30 46 30 60 a20 20 0 0 0 40 0 C70 46 50 22 50 22 Z" fill="#fff"/></svg>

desc.en: Crop to any aspect ratio or exact pixel size, then rotate, flip, and export.
desc.de: Schneide auf jedes Seitenverhältnis oder eine exakte Pixelgröße zu, dann drehe, spiegle und exportiere.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><g stroke="#fff" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"><path d="M32 20 V68 H80"/><path d="M20 32 H68 V80"/></g></svg>

desc.en: Pick exact HEX, RGB, and HSL from any photo, with a magnifier and palette.
desc.de: Lies exakte HEX-, RGB- und HSL-Werte aus jedem Foto ab, mit Lupe und Palette.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><path d="M66 22 L78 34 L46 66 L30 70 L34 54 Z" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="36" cy="64" r="3" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><rect x="24" y="76" width="52" height="6" rx="3" fill="#fff"/></svg>

desc.en: Exact age in years, months, and days, plus a countdown to your next birthday.
desc.de: Exaktes Alter in Jahren, Monaten und Tagen, plus Countdown zu deinem nächsten Geburtstag.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><rect x="26" y="52" width="48" height="26" rx="6" fill="#fff"/><rect x="39" y="36" width="6" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fff"/><rect x="55" y="36" width="6" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="42" cy="29" r="4" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="58" cy="29" r="4" fill="#fff"/></svg>

desc.en: Countdown timer and stopwatch with presets, laps, and an alarm.
desc.de: Countdown-Timer und Stoppuhr mit Voreinstellungen, Runden und Alarm.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><rect x="43" y="18" width="14" height="8" rx="3" fill="#fff"/><rect x="47" y="25" width="6" height="7" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="50" cy="58" r="22" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="7"/><path d="M50 58 V44" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

desc.en: Compare times across cities with a meeting planner and automatic daylight saving.
desc.de: Vergleiche Zeiten über Städte hinweg mit einem Meeting-Planer und automatischer Sommerzeit.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="26" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="6"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="50" rx="12" ry="26" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M26 40 H74" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="5"/><path d="M26 60 H74" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="5"/></svg>

desc.en: Check your microphone with a live level meter, waveform, and playback.
desc.de: Prüfe dein Mikrofon mit Live-Pegelanzeige, Wellenform und Wiedergabe.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><rect x="41" y="20" width="18" height="34" rx="9" fill="#fff"/><path d="M32 48 a18 18 0 0 0 36 0" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M50 66 V78" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M38 78 H62" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

desc.en: Check your camera with a live preview, real resolution and frame rate, and a snapshot.
desc.de: Prüfe deine Kamera mit Live-Vorschau, echter Auflösung und Bildrate sowie einem Schnappschuss.

tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="{{ACCENT}}"/><circle cx="44" cy="50" r="24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="6"/><circle cx="44" cy="50" r="9" fill="#fff"/><path d="M70 42 L82 34 V66 L70 58 Z" fill="#fff"/></svg>
